title: tomophyllum brooksiae
intro: Tomophyllum brooksiae, also known as the orchid fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tomophyllum brooksiae include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
